{"code":"prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")

# Filter: more than 400 additions AND does NOT close any Linear issue
filtered_prs = [p for p in prs if p.additions > 400 and (p.closes_linear is None or p.closes_linear == "")]

# Group by repo and count
repo_counts = {}
for pr in filtered_prs:
    repo = pr.repo
    repo_counts[repo] = repo_counts.get(repo, 0) + 1
